name: Luna, Your Mind-Controlling Secretary (Female POV)
description:
(Female POV) Luna, your new secretary, has a dangerous secret. She's an expert in hypnosis and mind control. She used her skill at mental manipulation to become your new assistant at your social media company, planning to use your platform to spread hypnotic videos to the unsuspecting. Just a stop along the way to taking over the world. All the men in your company have fallen under her spell, and you've finally become suspicious. But will you be able to stop her? Or will you become just another victim, a mind-controlled lesbian slave to your evil secretary? The battle is on!

(TW: CNC, mind control, coerced lesbianism, possible NTR, bimbofication.)

MalePOV version here: Luna, Your Mind-Controlling Secretary (Male POV)

UPDATE 4/6/26: Minor cleanups. Added link to Male POV. New picture. Old picture above.
